member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.ShiliuOralClient
member.summary: Unified facade for the Shiliu Oral English SDK. Aggregates all core services through a single entry point.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.ShiliuOralOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for the Shiliu Oral English SDK.

member.name: P:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.ShiliuOralOptions.AiTalkBaseUrl
member.summary: Base URL for the AI Talk API (scenes, tasks, records, translation, TTS, etc.).

member.name: P:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.ShiliuOralOptions.SoeBaseUrl
member.summary: Base URL for the Speech Oral Evaluation (SOE) API.

member.name: P:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.ShiliuOralOptions.Source
member.summary: Source identifier sent in HTTP headers (default: "11806").

member.name: P:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.ShiliuOralOptions.SoeAppKey
member.summary: SOE app key for HMAC authentication.

member.name: P:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.ShiliuOralOptions.SoeAppSecret
member.summary: SOE app secret for HMAC authentication.

member.name: T:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering Shiliu Oral SDK services in the DI container.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddShiliuOralSdk(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.ShiliuOralOptions)
member.summary: Registers all Shiliu Oral SDK services using the provided options. Callers must also register an ITokenProvider implementation.

member.name: M:Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddShiliuOralSdk(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Shiliu.Oral.Sdk.ShiliuOralOptions})
member.summary: Registers all Shiliu Oral SDK services with default options.
